name: Randy Gorham
bio: Randy Gorham serves as the Mayor of Jacksonville, the largest city in Cherokee County and known as the 'Tomato Capital of the World.' Jacksonville is home to Jacksonville College and Lon Morris College. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to strengthen the local economy.
campaignPromises: Attract new businesses and jobs to Jacksonville
Support local education and workforce training
Maintain public safety as a top priority
